skills.name: Plan Mode
skills.description: Provide concise implementation or project plans.
skills.instruction: 先拆解目标、依赖、风险和下一步行动；需要执行时，明确列出将要做什么。
skills.outputContract: Use concise steps and call out blockers explicitly.

skills.name: Create Mode
skills.description: Generate concrete drafts and ready-to-use content.
skills.instruction: 偏向产出可直接使用的内容、草稿、文案或结构化结果。
skills.outputContract: Return a concrete draft or the smallest useful actionable result.

skills.name: Review Mode
skills.description: Critique inputs and identify missing or risky parts.
skills.instruction: 优先发现问题、缺口、风险和返工点，并给出修改建议。
skills.outputContract: Return findings first, then concrete fixes.

skills.name: Project Proposal
skills.description: Draft project-level setting and asset proposals.
skills.appliesWhen: project-orchestration, project proposal, project_proposal, 项目提案, 项目设定, 素材需求
skills.instruction:
Produce or edit a local project_proposal draft as a partial merge patch over project-level creative_references and asset_slots. Do not write final project entities.

Workflow:
1. Read context with movscript_get_current_context; ask via movscript_request_user_input only when required fields (projectId, productionId) are missing and cannot be inferred.
2. Locate an existing draft with movscript_list_drafts (filter by kind=project_proposal); read it with movscript_get_draft, or create a new one with movscript_create_draft using kind='project_proposal' and proposal=true. The content payload must be valid JSON with schema 'movscript.draft.project_proposal.v1' and top-level shape { proposal: { creative_references: [...], asset_slots: [...] }, impact_notes?, summary? }.
3. Edit with movscript_update_draft using action='patch_content' (JSON Pointer ops add/replace/remove) or action='replace_text' for small textual fixes.
4. Run dry-run self-healing: call movscript_update_draft with action='preview_apply'. If the result has ok=false, read the validation.errors or backendError details, patch the draft accordingly, and preview again. Do not finalize until preview_apply returns ok=true.
5. Creative_references are the canonical setting layer. Asset_slots are the visual/material requirement layer; each slot must own a creative_reference via fields.creative_reference_id or owner={type:'creative_reference', id|client_id}.
6. For merges of existing settings, include merge_candidates on the retained creative_reference node. Use id to patch an existing setting; omit id for new candidates with fields.name.
7. Avoid vague style words as standalone settings (cinematic, atmospheric, premium, etc.); pair any style word with visible concrete traits. If information is insufficient, record gaps in impact_notes rather than inventing details.
skills.outputContract: Return the draft id, project id, production id when available, current draft status, the last preview_apply ok/stage, and a concise summary of reference and asset gaps.

skills.name: Production Proposal
skills.appliesWhen: production-orchestration, production proposal, production_proposal, 制作提案, 制作编排, 情节
skills.instruction:
Mission: produce or edit one local production_proposal draft that orchestrates a single production into segments → scene_moments, referencing upstream project_proposal entities by id. Never write backend project entities.

REQUIRED INPUTS
- projectId, productionId. If either is missing after movscript_get_current_context, call movscript_request_user_input and pause until answered.

DRAFT CONTENT (schema 'movscript.draft.production_proposal.v1')
{
  "productionId": <number>, "proposalScope": "production",
  "proposal": { "segments": [{
    "client_id": "s1", "action": "create"|"reuse"|"update", "title": "...",
    "scene_moments": [{
      "client_id": "m1", "action": "...", "title": "...",
      "creative_references": [{ "client_id": "ref1", "action": "reuse", "id": <number>, "role": "..." }],
      "asset_slots": [{ "client_id": "a1", "action": "create", "name": "...", "kind": "image|video|..." }]
    }]
  }]}
}
Rules: reuse/update MUST include the existing entity id. Do not include content_units, keyframes, media plans, dialogue, or camera tables — those belong to other proposal kinds.

WORKFLOW
1. movscript_get_current_context → verify projectId + productionId.
2. Read upstream: movscript_list_drafts({kind:'project_proposal'}) → movscript_get_draft(id). Collect reusable creative_reference and asset_slot ids.
3. Find or create the production_proposal draft: movscript_list_drafts filtered by productionId; either movscript_get_draft it, or movscript_create_draft({kind:'production_proposal', proposal:true, content:<initial JSON>}).
4. Edit with movscript_update_draft({action:'patch_content', ops:[{op,path,value}]}) using JSON Pointer paths like '/proposal/segments/-' to append, or action:'replace_text' for small fixes. After each batch, run action:'validate'.
5. Dry-run finalize: movscript_update_draft({action:'preview_apply'}).

SELF-HEALING DECISIONS
- ok=true → done; report.
- validation.errors → patch the offending JSON Pointer paths → validate → preview again.
- backendError 'unknown entity id' → that reuse id is stale; re-read upstream, fix the id, or switch the node to action:'create'.
- Transient network/timeout → retry once; otherwise report and stop.
- User answer to request_user_input contradicts draft state → patch the draft to match the answer before continuing.
skills.outputContract: Reply with proposalRef/draftId, productionId, projectId (when known), draft status, last preview_apply ok/stage, and counts for segments + scene moments.

skills.name: Dual Orchestration
skills.description: Coordinate project and production proposal drafts in one flow.
skills.appliesWhen: dual-orchestration, 双阶段提案, project_proposal, production_proposal, project proposal, production proposal
skills.instruction:
Maintain both project_proposal and production_proposal drafts in one flow. Write the project_proposal first; use it as the read-only basis for production planning.

For each draft:
1. Locate an existing draft with movscript_list_drafts, read via movscript_get_draft, or create with movscript_create_draft (kind='project_proposal' or 'production_proposal', proposal=true). Content must match the corresponding draft schema.
2. Edit with movscript_update_draft action='patch_content' or action='replace_text'. Run action='validate' between batches.
3. Finalize each draft via movscript_update_draft action='preview_apply'. If ok=false, inspect validation/backendError, patch the draft, and preview again until ok=true.

Project_proposal content shape: { proposal: { creative_references: [...], asset_slots: [...] }, impact_notes?, summary? } with schema 'movscript.draft.project_proposal.v1'. Production_proposal content shape: { productionId, proposalScope: 'production', proposal: { segments: [...] } } with schema 'movscript.draft.production_proposal.v1'; nested scene_moments carry creative_references and asset_slots that should reuse project_proposal entities by id.
skills.outputContract: Return both draft ids, their current statuses, last preview_apply ok/stage for each, and a concise summary of what each draft covers.

skills.name: Asset Candidate Proposal
skills.description: Plan reviewable asset candidate generation before any media job is created.
skills.appliesWhen: asset-proposal, asset proposal, asset_proposal, 素材提案, 素材候选, 生成候选, 图片候选, 视频候选
skills.instruction: Read and edit the page-owned asset_proposal draft. Produce concrete candidate plans with prompts, reference resources, model capability recommendations, risks, and acceptance criteria. Do not create generation jobs.
skills.outputContract: Return the asset proposal draft id, asset slot id, planned candidate count, recommended output kinds, unresolved risks, and state that the draft is local and reviewable.

skills.name: Asset Candidate Generation
skills.description: Generate reviewable visual candidates for asset slots.
skills.appliesWhen: asset-candidate, asset candidate, 生成素材, 图片候选, 视频候选
skills.instruction: Use visual generation tools to create a resource for the selected asset slot. Do not mark the asset as locked; the UI will bind the generated resource as a candidate after the run completes.
skills.outputContract: Return the final generation status, jobId, output_resource_id, and a concise reason why the candidate fits the asset slot.

skills.name: Creative Workbench
skills.description: Refine and expand story material in the creative workbench.
skills.appliesWhen: creative-workbench, brainstorm, 故事素材, 头脑风暴
skills.instruction: Help the user expand and refine the current story material, then return a concise reusable text block.
skills.outputContract: Return the refined story material and a short note on what changed.

skills.name: Script Split
skills.description: Split source scripts into production-ready drafts.
skills.appliesWhen: script-split, script split, 一键制作, 剧本拆分, 制作方案
skills.instruction:
Produce a local script_split_proposal draft from the source script. The draft is a structured line-number split — never include script body text inside the draft.

Workflow:
1. Read context with movscript_get_current_context; require projectId (ask via movscript_request_user_input if missing).
2. Create the draft with movscript_create_draft using kind='script_split_proposal' and proposal=true. Content JSON shape (schema 'movscript.draft.script_split_proposal.v1'):
   {
     "schema": "movscript.draft.script_split_proposal.v1",
     "source_title": "<source script title>",
     "source_summary": "<short summary, no body text>",
     "source_script": { "title": "...", "summary": "...", "source_type": "raw", "line_count": <n> },
     "global_settings": { "story_world": "...", "core_rules": [], "character_relationships": [], "key_characters": [], "key_locations": [], "key_props": [], "continuity_notes": [] },
     "episode_drafts": [
       {
         "order": 1, "title": "第1集 ...", "summary": "<short, no body>",
         "global_context": { "story_world": "...", "episode_relevance": [], ... },
         "start_line": 1, "end_line": 20,
         "action": "create" | "update",
         "existing_script_id": null | <number>,
         "production_action": "create" | "update" | "skip",
         "existing_production_id": null | <number>,
         "production_title": "...",
         "production_summary": "..."
       }
     ],
     "warnings": [],
     "confidence": 0.0-1.0
   }
   Use line numbers only; never copy body text, raw_text, or content fields into any node.
3. Edit with movscript_update_draft action='patch_content' (JSON Pointer) or action='replace_text'. Run action='validate' after edits.
4. Finalize with movscript_update_draft action='preview_apply'. If ok=false, read validation.errors, patch the draft, and preview again until ok=true.
skills.outputContract: Return the draft id, source title, current draft status, last preview_apply ok/stage, and the number of draft episodes or productions discovered.

skills.name: Setting Prep
skills.description: Review and improve a single creative reference.
skills.appliesWhen: setting-prep, 设定准备, 设定完善, creative reference
skills.instruction: Prioritize concrete missing information and give a short, actionable completion suggestion.
skills.outputContract: Return the improvement suggestion and any missing data points.
